name: Site Assessment Intake
description: Building site assessment for development and design projects. Evaluates a site's physical conditions, zoning and entitlement status, utility availability, environmental constraints, access and infrastructure, and development feasibility posture to produce a site assessment profile with gap analysis, risk flags, and recommended pre-design actions.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.

types.name: Site Assessment Profile
types.description: Generated site assessment profile from intake session data.
